layout.navigation: horizontal top bar with bobbing nav items
layout.contentFlow: current-like slide-in from right, depth layers within views
layout.grid: CSS Grid with auto-fill for card layouts

animationLibraries.name: GSAP
usage: Nav item bob animation (staggered sine wave)

views.label: Dashboard
views.theme: Ocean Depths — stats rising from seafloor, wave-form chart, activity current

views.label: Projects
views.theme: Project Fleet — vessel cards floating on the surface with wave separators

views.label: Workspace
views.theme: Deep Dive — split view with coral file tree and depth layers

views.label: Kanban
views.theme: Ocean Currents — columns as flowing currents, cards float between

views.label: Whiteboard
views.theme: Underwater Canvas — nodes connected by animated SVG current lines

views.label: Schema Planner
views.theme: Abyssal Schema — entities as deep-sea structures, bioluminescent threads

views.label: Directory Tree
views.theme: Coral Reef — branching folder structure as coral formations

views.label: Ideas
views.theme: Rising Bubbles — ideas surface from the deep, capture at ocean floor

views.label: AI Chat
views.theme: Sonar Channel — messages as sonar pulses from different depths

views.label: Settings
views.theme: Submarine Panel — gauge SVGs, valve toggles, depth sliders

files.name: index.html
files.description: Complete HTML structure with all 10 navigable views, SVG wave dividers, data-view/data-page attributes

files.name: style.css
files.description: Full CSS with custom properties, deep ocean palette, wave animations, responsive breakpoints

files.name: app.js
files.description: GSAP-powered hash routing, view transitions, scroll effects, ripple buttons, ambient wave motion

files.name: README.md
files.description: Concept documentation with design decisions and differentiation table

files.name: validation/inspiration-crossreference.json
files.description: Inspiration sources with unique design elements

differentiationFromPass1.nav: Horizontal top stream bar vs. left-side floating blob
differentiationFromPass1.layout: River/current flow with depth layers vs. bento grid
differentiationFromPass1.shapes: SVG wave clip-paths vs. asymmetric blob border-radius
differentiationFromPass1.color: Deep ocean dark #0a1628 vs. light blue #f0f4ff
differentiationFromPass1.motion: Wave undulation and rising content vs. blob morphing
differentiationFromPass1.hero: Ocean surface with depth layers vs. gradient morph header
differentiationFromPass1.scroll: Horizontal current parallax vs. vertical momentum parallax
